sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check the player position. I notice the pink bar at the bottom seems to have shrunk (from the image). Let me check the player position and the bottom bar.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check player position
after = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']

print("Player position:")
for n in after:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'N', 'G']:
        print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

print("\nLeft frame:")
for n in after:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 12:
        print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

print("\nBottom bar:")
for n in after:
    if n['color'] in ['P', 'c'] and n['pixels'] > 15:
        print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.content:
OK, so:
- Player: W at [[40, 16], [40, 19], [44, 19], [44, 16]], N at [[45, 16], [45, 19], [47, 19], [47, 16]]
- Player is at col 16-19, row 40-47
- Left frame (Node 1): c, [[28, 16], [28, 19], [31, 19], [31, 16]] - at col 16-19, row 28-31
- Node 11: c, [[63, 47], [63, 63]] - bottom-right corner (17 pixels)
